settings.heading: FAQ
settings.lede: Quick answers for sizing, drops, orders, and support.

settings.title: When do drops ship?
settings.text: Most ready products ship after order processing. Pre-order or limited-run drops may have a longer dispatch window, which should be noted on the product page.

settings.title: How do I track an order?
settings.text: Login to your account with the checkout email, then open your order. Tracking links appear after fulfillment.

settings.title: Can I change my address?
settings.text: Contact support as soon as possible with your order number. Address changes are only possible before fulfillment.
